books.title: Islands of Space
books.author: John W. Campbell
books.summary: Four men become the first humans to travel to other galaxies.

books.title: Behind That Curtain
books.author: Earl Derr Biggers
books.summary: A Chinese detective is asked to assist in the solution of a missing woman and the murder of a detective from Scotland Yard.

books.title: Elizabeth and Her German Garden
books.author: Elizabeth von Arnim
books.summary: The English wife of a German aristocrat recounts, through a series of diary entries, a year spent revitalizing the neglected garden of their estate.

books.title: The Lives and Opinions of Eminent Philosophers
books.author: Diogenes Laërtius
books.summary: Brief biographies of the prominent philosophers of ancient Greece.

books.title: The Enchanted Castle
books.author: E. Nesbit
books.summary: Three children discover a wonderful garden and castle, and come into possession of a magic ring which entangles them in many strange adventures.

books.title: As You Like It
books.author: William Shakespeare
books.summary: Forced to flee to the Forest of Arden, the daughter of a duke encounters a variety of characters, her banished father, and even finds love.

books.title: Ghosts
books.author: Henrik Ibsen
books.summary: A Norwegian sea captain’s widow who, no matter how much she tries, cannot escape the ghosts of the past.

books.title: The Worm Ouroboros
books.author: E. R. Eddison
books.summary: The King Gorice of Witchland and the lords of Demonland wage war in the high-fantasy lands of Mercury.

books.title: The Bellamy Trial
books.author: Frances Noyes Hart
books.summary: A man and a woman are on trial for the murder of his wife, her friend.

books.title: Short Fiction
books.author: Arthur Machen
books.summary: A collection of nine short fiction works by influential supernatural and horror author Arthur Machen.

books.title: My Four Weeks in France
books.author: Ring Lardner
books.summary: A sports columnist and humorist travels to France as a war correspondent during World War I and recounts his experiences on the assignment.

books.title: The Cheyne Mystery
books.author: Freeman Wills Crofts
books.summary: A man is drugged and then burgled for something he doesn’t know he has.

books.title: A Daughter of the Samurai
books.author: Etsu Inagaki Sugimoto
books.summary: The autobiography of Etsu Sugimoto, a girl born into a samurai family in a time of great cultural changes.

books.title: The Social Contract
books.author: Jean-Jacques Rousseau
books.summary: Rousseau explores the political philosophy of authority originating from the consent of the people.

books.title: Poems on Various Subjects, Religious and Moral
books.author: Phillis Wheatley
books.summary: Phillis Wheatley’s only published collection of poetry.

books.title: Vile Bodies
books.author: Evelyn Waugh
books.summary: A young man in Roaring Twenties London endures ups and downs in varied situations and relationships.

books.title: Triplanetary
books.author: E. E. Smith
books.summary: In a universe where all powerful alien races influence the fates of worlds, a war erupts between the Triplanetary League of the inner solar system, pirates led by a mysterious and malicious scientist, and technologically advanced aliens.

books.title: The Amateur Cracksman
books.author: E. W. Hornung
books.summary: A British cricketer and his friend steal valuables in this first collection of A. J. Raffles short stories.

books.title: The Story of My Experiments with Truth
books.author: Mahatma Gandhi
books.summary: Gandhi relates his life experiences from his birth in Gujarat in 1869 through the Indian National Congress of 1915.

books.title: Journals
books.author: Alexander Mackenzie
books.summary: Explorer Alexander Mackenzie details his journeys to both the Arctic and Pacific Oceans in his personal journals.
